
# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on Keep a Changelog,
and this project follows Semantic Versioning where practical.

## [Unreleased]

### Added
- Initial Git and GitHub mastery course structure
- Beginner, intermediate, advanced, and scenario-based interview sections
- Mistakes and recovery handbook
- Hands-on challenges and real-world labs
- Productivity, best practices, roadmap, and cheat sheets
- Templates for commit messages, PRs, bug reports, and releases

### Changed
- Improved repository structure for modular learning
- Added Mermaid diagrams across learning modules

### Fixed
- N/A

## [1.0.0] - 2026-04-19

### Added
- Initial public version of the repository
- Core README homepage
- Git recovery modules
- Interview preparation system
- Challenge labs
- Bonus resources
